channel.title: Eventually Consistent Opinions
channel.description: Recent content on Eventually Consistent Opinions

item.title: Using AI for Scalability Analysis
item.description:
Actual output from Claude Sonnet 4.5 today:

Scalability Analysis

  • 10,000 entries over 5 years: ~200 entries/year = ~17 entries/month

You would think that computers, being literal computers, would be better at math…

item.title: Certificates in Docker Containers
item.description:
If you’re using a minimal image, you might need to add ca-certificates:

FROM alpine AS certs
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

FROM scratch
COPY --from=certs /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt /etc/ssl/certs/
COPY my-go-binary /
CMD ["/my-go-binary"]

item.title: Joining Python Paths
item.description:
Joining a directory with a leading slash doesn’t necessarily do what you’d think.

import os

os.path.join("/tmp/", "other")
# '/tmp/other'
os.path.join("/tmp/", "other")
# '/tmp/other'
os.path.join("/tmp/", "/other")
# '/other'  (?!)

import pathlib

tmp = pathlib.Path("/tmp")
other = pathlib.Path("other")
tmp / other
# PosixPath('/tmp/other')
other = pathlib.Path("/other")
tmp / other
# PosixPath('/other')
